title: US House lawmakers launch probe into Kalshi, Polymarket insider trading
summary: US House lawmakers launch probe into Kalshi, Polymarket insider trading
briefing: Representative James Comer asked CEOs of two major prediction market companies for information on their responses to insider trading after “suspiciously timed trades” related to US military actions against Iran.

title: NEAR protocol leads AI token rally with a 50% pump: Is $5 NEAR price next?
summary: NEAR protocol leads AI token rally with a 50% pump: Is $5 NEAR price next?
briefing: NEAR price surges 50% in a week as AI token momentum, Nvidia optimism and network upgrades fuel bullish sentiment.

title: Crypto Biz: Institutions tighten their grip on Bitcoin, AI and prediction markets
summary: Crypto Biz: Institutions tighten their grip on Bitcoin, AI and prediction markets
briefing: Institutional crypto adoption accelerates as Tether expands Bitcoin holdings, miners pivot to AI and Polymarket joins Nasdaq amid $1 billion fund outflows.

title: Crypto, Banks, Policy Experts Press Congress to Modernize Bank Secrecy Act
summary: Crypto, Banks, Policy Experts Press Congress to Modernize Bank Secrecy Act
briefing: A House subcommittee hearing exposed a divide over how far to scale back the 1970-era anti-money laundering law as Trump expands its reach.

title: Crypto Is Growing Up—Why Some Everyday Traders Are Moving On
summary: Crypto Is Growing Up—Why Some Everyday Traders Are Moving On
briefing: Muted volatility, political shifts, and Wall Street dominance are driving increasingly jaded retail traders out of crypto.

title: Trump Media Moves Over $200 Million in Bitcoin as Losses Pile Up: Arkham
summary: Trump Media Moves Over $200 Million in Bitcoin as Losses Pile Up: Arkham
